name: Cofense Triage v2 API
description: This app supports actions for Cofense Triage's version 2 API for faster bidirectional phishing analysis and response

actions.name: Get Reports
actions.description: Retrieve reports from the Cofense Triage Platform filtered based on the provided parameters

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: Allows filtering the reports based on the location

parameters.name: from_address
parameters.description: Allows filtering the reports based on the sender's email address of the reported email

parameters.name: reporter_email
parameters.description: Allows filtering the reports based on the reporter's email address

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Allows filtering the reports based on the subject of the reported email

parameters.name: match_priority
parameters.description: Allows filtering the result data set based on the highest priority of a rule matching the reported email

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: Allows filtering the reports based on the category ID

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Allows filtering the reports updated on or after the provided date

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Allows filtering the reports updated before the provided date

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Allows filtering the reports based on the list of comma-separated tags. If the tag value contains a comma, enclose it in double-quotes (Example: tag1,"test,tag",tag2)

parameters.name: categorization_tags
parameters.description: Allows filtering the reports based on the list of comma-separated categorization tags

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Allows sorting the reports based on the 'updated_at' date of the report

parameters.name: ingest_report
parameters.description: Allows ingestion of the report into the container

parameters.name: ingest_subfields
parameters.description: Allows ingestion of the fields relating to the report into the container

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Allows ingestion of data into the container(s) with the provided label. The label must be valid or the action will fail. Required if 'ingest_report' or 'ingest_subfields' is set

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Allows creation of container(s) for the provided tenant ID or tenant name. The tenant must be valid or the action will fail. Required if 'ingest_report' or 'ingest_subfields' is set

parameters.name: cef_mapping
parameters.description: JSON dictionary represented as a serialized JSON string. Each key in the dictionary is a potential key name in an artifact that is to be renamed to the value

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Retrieve a report with the provided ID from the Cofense Triage Platform

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: The ID of the report which is to be fetched

parameters.name: ingest_report
parameters.description: Allow ingestion of the report into the container

parameters.name: ingest_subfields
parameters.description: Ingestion of the fields relating to the report into the container

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Allows ingestion of data into the container(s) with the provided label. The label must be valid or the action will fail. Required if 'ingest_report' or 'ingest_subfields' is set

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Allows creation of container(s) for the provided tenant ID or tenant name. The tenant must be valid or the action will fail. Required if 'ingest_report' or 'ingest_subfields' is set

parameters.name: cef_mapping
parameters.description: JSON dictionary represented as a serialized JSON string. Each key in the dictionary is a potential key name in an artifact that is to be renamed to the value

actions.name: Get Email
actions.description: Downloads the raw email for the report that matches the specified report ID

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: The ID of the report

parameters.name: download_method
parameters.description: Allows the user to download the email as an artifact or as a vaulted file

parameters.name: create_vaulted_file_artifact
parameters.description: If storing as a vaulted file, this parameter allows the user to create an artifact referencing that file

actions.name: Get Categories
actions.description: Retrieve categories from the Cofense Triage Platform filtered based on the provided parameters

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Allows the user to fetch the categories with the name containing a specific string

parameters.name: malicious
parameters.description: Allows the user to fetch the categories based on whether the category is used to classify malicious reports or not

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Responses
actions.description: Retrieve responses from the Cofense Triage Platform. This action is supported for Cofense Triage with version older than 1.23

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Allows the user to limit the number of results

actions.name: Create Response
actions.description: Create a response. This action is supported for Cofense Triage with version older than 1.23

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Display name of the response sent to individuals

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Subject of the response

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Body of the email

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of the response

parameters.name: to_reporter
parameters.description: To add the reporter to the response recipient list or not

parameters.name: to_other
parameters.description: To add the addresses specified in 'to_other_address' to the response recipient list or not

parameters.name: to_other_address
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses to send the response to

parameters.name: attach_original
parameters.description: To attach the original email to the response or not

parameters.name: cc_address
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses to CC the response to

parameters.name: bcc_address
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of email addresses to BCC the response to

actions.name: Categorize Report
actions.description: Categorize a report into the provided category

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: The ID of the report

parameters.name: category_id
parameters.description: The ID of the category

parameters.name: category_name
parameters.description: The name of the category

parameters.name: response_id
parameters.description: The ID of the response

parameters.name: categorization_tags
parameters.description: Allows the user to provide multiple tags to the report while categorizing it

actions.name: Get Threat Indicators
actions.description: Retrieve threat indicators from the Cofense Triage Platform filtered based on the provided parameters

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: The level of the threat indicator

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the threat indicators

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source of the threat indicators

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of the threat indicators

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Threat indicators updated on or after the provided date

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Threat indicators updated before the provided date

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting based on updated date of threat indicators

parameters.name: ingest_threat_indicator
parameters.description: Ingestion of threat indicator(s) into the container(s)

parameters.name: ingest_subfields
parameters.description: Allow ingestion of the fields relating to the threat indicator into the container

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Allows ingestion of data into the container(s) with the provided label. The label must be valid or the action will fail. Required if 'ingest_threat_indicator' or 'ingest_subfields' is set

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Allows creation of container(s) for the provided tenant ID or tenant name. The tenant must be valid or the action will fail. Required if 'ingest_threat_indicator' or 'ingest_subfields' is set

parameters.name: cef_mapping
parameters.description: JSON dictionary represented as a serialized JSON string

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Create Threat Indicator
actions.description: Create a threat indicator with the provided parameters

parameters.name: level
parameters.description: The level of the threat indicator

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the threat indicator

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of the threat indicator

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source of the threat indicator

actions.name: Get Reporters
actions.description: Retrieve reporters from the Cofense Triage Platform filtered based on the provided parameters

parameters.name: vip
parameters.description: Allows searching for the VIP reporters

parameters.name: reputation_score
parameters.description: Allows searching for reporters having the provided reputation score. It allows a comma-separated list

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Allows searching for the reporter with a specific email

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Allows sorting the reporters based on the ID

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Reporter
actions.description: Retrieve a reporter from the Cofense Triage Platform for the provided reporter ID

parameters.name: reporter_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the reporter

actions.name: Get Urls
actions.description: Retrieve URLs from the Cofense Triage Platform filtered based on the provided parameters

parameters.name: risk_score
parameters.description: Risk score of the URL

parameters.name: risk_score_operator
parameters.description: Operator to work with the risk score parameter

parameters.name: url_value
parameters.description: Value of the URL to search for

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Allows filtering the URLs updated on or after the provided date

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Allows filtering the URLs updated before the provided date

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Allows sorting the URLs based on the 'updated_at' date

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Url
actions.description: Retrieve a URL from the Cofense Triage Platform for the provided URL ID

parameters.name: url_id
parameters.description: ID of the URL

actions.name: Get Comments
actions.description: Retrieve comments from the Cofense Triage Platform filtered based on the provided parameters

parameters.name: body_format
parameters.description: Allows filtering the comments based on the format of the comment body

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Allows filtering the comments based on the list of comma-separated tags. If the tag value contains a comma, enclose it in double-quotes (Example: tag1,"test,tag",tag2)

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Allows filtering the comments updated on or after the provided date

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Allows filtering the comments updated before the provided date

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Allows sorting the comments based on the 'updated_at' date of the comment

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Comment
actions.description: Retrieve a comment from the Cofense Triage Platform for the provided comment ID

parameters.name: comment_id
parameters.description: ID of the comment

actions.name: Get Rules
actions.description: Retrieve rules from the Cofense Triage Platform filtered based on the provided parameters

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules based on the name

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules based on the description

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules based on the priority

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules based on the list of comma-separated tags. If the tag value contains a comma, enclose it in double-quotes (Example: tag1,"test,tag",tag2)

parameters.name: scope
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules based on the scope

parameters.name: author_name
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules based on the author name

parameters.name: rule_context
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules based on the context

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules based on the status

parameters.name: reports_count
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules based on the number of reports the rule matched

parameters.name: reports_count_operator
parameters.description: Operator to work with the reports count parameter

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules updated on or after the provided date

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: Allows filtering the rules updated before the provided date

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Allows sorting the rules based on the 'updated_at' date of the rule

parameters.name: max_results
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

actions.name: Get Rule
actions.description: Retrieve a rule from the Cofense Triage Platform for the provided rule ID

parameters.name: rule_id
parameters.description: ID of the rule

parameters.name: ingest_report
parameters.description: Allows ingestion of the reports related to the rule into the container

parameters.name: ingest_subfields
parameters.description: Allows ingestion of fields relating to the report into the container

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Allows ingestion of data into the container(s) with the provided label. The label must be valid or the action will fail. Required if 'ingest_report' or 'ingest_subfields' is set

parameters.name: tenant
parameters.description: Allows creation of container(s) for the provided tenant ID or tenant name. The tenant must be valid or the action will fail. Required if 'ingest_report' or 'ingest_subfields' is set

parameters.name: cef_mapping
parameters.description: JSON dictionary represented as a serialized JSON string. Each key in the dictionary is a potential key name in an artifact that is to be renamed to the value

actions.name: Get Integration Submissions
actions.description: Retrieve integration submissions from the Cofense Triage Platform filtered based on the provided parameters

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of integration submission

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The value of integration submission

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Action handler for the on poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of containers to ingest

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app
